description: Analyze the carbon footprint sources of the Eastern US electricity grid. Import the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and TRACI 2.1 methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). Using the "Electricity, at grid, Eastern US" product system, calculate the Global Warming Potential with TRACI 2.1. Categorize the contributing processes into four specific groups: "Fossil" (Coal, Natural Gas, Oil, Petroleum, Lignite, Diesel), "Nuclear" (Nuclear fuel/power), "Renewable" (Hydro, Wind, Solar, Biomass, Geothermal), and "Other" (all remaining infrastructure/transport items). Export the grouped result table showing contribution values to ~/LCA_Results/grid_source_breakdown.csv.
